name: Hearthlands
descr: 关于此游戏Hearthlands is a medieval/fantasy city-building real time strategy game in which you take a role of a king in a procedurally generated world. You can not control your subjects directly; instead you focus on city-building, resource management, diplomacy, magic and other things a  typical king deals with on a daily basis.The game is very flexible: you can build a powerful realm and rule the lands with an iron grip, or establish a humble fishermen village. Or create a trading empire. Or found a small, but well-defended outpost or a raider's camp. Or become a host of a wizard's manor.All characters, from a humble hauler to a powerful wizard have their own minds and behavior patterns. Sometimes it is interesting just to watch people scurry about minding their own business.Features:Build a medieval city;Play the game the way you like it: experiment with sandbox settings or play a campaign mode (ex. Polish localization);Keep your people happy by providing them with necessary resources and services;Gather resources, produce goods and build industries;See reports and tune up your economy;Build an army and protect your city from monsters and invasions;Trade and conduct diplomacy with neighbouring realms, or go to war with them;Research technologies and cast spells;Challenge yourself by going after one of the many achievements.
detail:
名称: Hearthlands
类型: 独立, 模拟, 策略
开发者: Four White Cats
发行商: Four White Cats
发行日期: 2017 年 4 月 28 日
